center.name: 马蒂兰·雅克·布里松
center.summary: 马蒂兰·雅克·布里松是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括角叫鴨，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The horned screamer (Anhima cornuta) is a species of bird that belongs to a relatively small family, the Anhimidae, which occurs in wetlands of tropical South America
